data.title: Rockwell Powers up Lucid's Saudi factory in EV push with FactoryTalk MES system; factory in KAEC.
data.description: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) has enhanced its partnership with Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) to assist the automaker's growth at a new manufacturing facility in Saudi Arabia. Situated in King Abdullah Economic City (KAEC), this plant is the first of its kind in the Kingdom and complements Saudi Arabia's industrial ambitions under Vision 2030. Lucid will incorporate Rockwell Automation's software solutions, including the FactoryTalk MES, to streamline production in vital areas like general assembly, paint, stamping, body, and powertrain. This move aims to enhance production efficiency by offering real-time visibility, traceability, and control capabilities.

data.title: Talos Energy extends credit facility maturity to 2030, $700 million borrowing base reaffirmed.
data.description: Talos Energy Inc. has recently disclosed the signing of an Amended and Restated Credit Agreement, maintaining the Company's borrowing base at $700 million. This agreement also extends the maturity date to January 20, 2030.

data.title: IGT celebrates 50th anniversary with wins at ICE Barcelona 2026: Named "Best Slot Provider of the Year" and earns ICE Landmark Award. Everi's Cash Redemption Terminal wins "Best Cash Handling Product" at Euro Casino Awards. Las Vegas, Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: A company was awarded the title of "Best Slot Provider of the Year" at the International Gaming Awards and also received an ICE Landmark Award. Additionally, their Premium Cash Redemption Terminal was recognized as the "Best Cash Handling Product" at the European Casino Awards. These achievements were announced by IGT in Las Vegas on January 21, 2026, marking a significant milestone for the company in the gaming industry.

data.title: MIAX sells MIAXdx to Robinhood-Susquehanna joint venture, retains 10% stake. Deal finalized on Jan 21, 2026.
data.description: Miami International Holdings, Inc. (MIAX) has decided to maintain a 10% ownership stake in the Exchange and Clearinghouse. The company, based in Princeton, New Jersey and Miami, made this announcement on January 21, 2026. MIAX is known for its advanced technology in creating and managing regulated financial markets. The retention of the 10% stake signifies their continued involvement and commitment to the exchange.

data.title: Global Veterinary Diagnostics Market to grow at 10.75% CAGR by 2035 as demand for early disease detection and precision diagnostics rises.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, it was reported that the Global Veterinary Diagnostics Market is experiencing a significant evolution, driven by the growing emphasis on early disease detection, preventive healthcare, and precise diagnostics for companion and production animals. This trend is observed globally as veterinary healthcare systems are placing more importance on these aspects. This shift in focus is leading to notable advancements in veterinary diagnostics sector, with a surge in demand for such services.

data.title: Spire Global adds Admiral Grady and Newberry to Advisory Board (NYSE: SPIR), enhancing national security capabilities.
data.description: In Vienna, Virginia, Spire Global, Inc. revealed the addition of Admiral Christopher W. Grady (Ret.) and Edward J. Newberry to its Advisory Board. Admiral Grady, former Vice Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, brings extensive experience to the role. Newberry, a seasoned public policy and government affairs leader, also joins the board. This move is significant as it aligns with the increasing reliance on commercial space-based data by governments and allies globally. Spire Global, a leading provider of space-based data, analytics, and services, trades on the NYSE under the ticker symbol SPIR.

data.title: Emily Fong Mitchell appointed CEO of Lornamead by Sojourner for leading growth phase.
data.description: Tonawanda, New York - Sojourner has announced the appointment of Emily Fong Mitchell as the CEO of Lornamead to spearhead the company's upcoming growth phase.

data.title: SlowMist warns of a crypto seed phrase attack on Linux Snap Store. Expired domains led to malicious wallet updates.
data.description: Hackers took control of reputable Snap Store developers through expired domains, enabling them to push out harmful wallet updates to established Linux users.

data.title: Nextdoor sets date for Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results and conference call in San Francisco.
data.description: Nextdoor, headquartered in San Francisco, has disclosed their plans to release their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company has scheduled a conference call to discuss these results on a specified date.

data.title: Nova Minerals confirms potential higher-grade starter pit within the 4.05 Moz Korbel Gold Deposit in Alaska.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Nova Minerals Limited disclosed encouraging findings from shallow reverse circulation drilling at the Korbel Main Deposit in their Estelle Gold and Critical Minerals Project in Anchorage, Alaska. The Company's flagship project, situated in the productive Tintina Gold Belt, reported positive results from drilling conducted within a planned starter pit. Nova Minerals Limited is listed on the NASDAQ as NVA, ASX as NVA, and FRA as QM3.

data.title: Drut Technologies rebrands to Corespan Systems, focusing on AI infrastructure. New identity announced on Jan. 21, 2026.
data.description: A company based in Nashua, New Hampshire, made a significant announcement on January 21, 2026. Drut Technologies, known for its high-performance compute infrastructure solutions, unveiled its new identity as Corespan Systems. This rebranding signifies a shift in focus towards expediting the implementation and expansion of cutting-edge AI and data technologies. This move demonstrates the company's intention to evolve and adapt to the rapidly changing tech landscape.

data.title: In 2025, in-app purchases reached $167 billion globally, outpacing game spending for the first time.
data.description: On January 21, 2026, Sensor Tower, a prominent data provider in the digital economy, unveiled its 2026 annual State of Mobile report. The report disclosed that global in-app purchases (IAP) surged to $167 billion in 2025, marking a 10% growth from the previous year.

data.title: CGI to host Annual General Meeting of Shareholders and release Fiscal 2026 first quarter results on Jan. 28th. Stock symbols: GIB.A (TSX) GIB (NYSE).
data.description: CGI (TSX: GIB.A) (NYSE: GIB) will be holding its Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on January 28, 2026. The company will also be announcing its Fiscal 2026 first quarter results during the meeting. Investors can follow the updates by visiting cgi.com/newsroom.
